questions.q: A notice is usually written in the first person from the point of view of the writer. Which of the following is the best option?
questions.explanation: A notice is usually written in the first person from the point of view of the writer. This is because a notice is a formal announcement, and the writer wants to establish a direct connection with the reader.

questions.q: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of a formal notice?
questions.explanation: Formal notices use complex and technical language to convey information. Simple language is more commonly used in informal notices.

questions.q: What is the primary purpose of a notice?
questions.explanation: The primary purpose of a notice is to inform the reader about something, such as an event, a rule, or an announcement.

questions.q: Which of the following is a common feature of a formal notice?
questions.explanation: A formal notice typically has an official heading that includes the name of the organization, the date, and the subject of the notice.

questions.q: What is the tone of a notice usually?
questions.explanation: The tone of a notice is usually formal and polite, as it is a formal announcement that requires respect and attention.

questions.q: A formal notice is usually addressed to
questions.explanation: A formal notice is usually addressed to a specific person or group, as it is a formal announcement that requires attention from a particular audience.

questions.q: Which of the following is a characteristic of an informal notice?
questions.explanation: An informal notice often has a personal touch, as it is written in a friendly and approachable style.

questions.q: What is the main purpose of a notice board?
questions.explanation: A notice board is primarily used to display notices, as it is a convenient way to communicate information to a large audience.

questions.q: Which of the following is a common type of notice?
questions.explanation: There are many types of notices, including official, personal, and public notices. Each type of notice has a specific purpose and audience.

questions.q: What is the difference between a formal and informal notice?
opts: (A) Formal notices are written in a formal tone, while informal notices are written in an informal tone.
(B) Formal notices are written in an informal tone, while informal notices are written in a formal tone.
(C) Formal notices are written in a personal style, while informal notices are written in a professional style.
(D) Formal notices are written in a professional style, while informal notices are written in a personal style.
questions.explanation: The main difference between a formal and informal notice is the tone and style in which it is written. Formal notices are written in a formal tone, while informal notices are written in an informal tone.
